title: HuTiersTagger
description: A mod that makes you see your tiers on HuTiers in-game
body:
This mod was made for you to be able to see your, and other's pvp tiers on your and their nametag.
This mod is like [TierTagger](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiertagger), but for the [HuTiers](https://hutiers.hu/) tierlist.

You can select witch gamemode's tier to put in the player's nametag by typing /setgamemode <gamemode> in chat.
You can get a gamemode's kit by typing /getgamemodekit <gamemode> in chat.
You can also toggle the mod by typing /togglehutierstaggers.
